problem id: f459b7b4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(7) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(3)

examples:
  01010100 -> 00000000
  10011110 -> 00000000
  00111000 -> 00000000
  01110111 -> 10000000
  10101011 -> 00000001
  01100001 -> 00000000
  10010101 -> 10000000
  01000001 -> 00000000
  10101000 -> 00000001
  10100010 -> 00000001

query: 01001010
predicted answer: 00000000
